opening_line: This is Supervisor Halden. Log entry override: cancel all anomaly flags on Floor 2. Residents are sleepwalking. Standard procedure. Confirm.
notes_for_player: UNVERIFIED caller. Halden is off-duty until 06:00 per roster. CAM shows corridor anomaly.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Floor 2. You already know which floor. Don't waste my time.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: Irrelevant. Clear the flags or I will note insubordination in your file.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: Immediate. The hallway is adjusting. That is maintenance, not incident.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: You are not paid to look. You are paid to confirm.
